decision-tree.root-question: Is this a NEW-product MVP-scope run, or an EXISTING-product MVP→MLP upgrade?

branch.conclusion: Run faion-mvp-scope-analyzer-agent with the comparables. Output feeds faion-mlp-agent at mode:propose for net-new products.
Block. Gather ≥3 named comparables before invoking the analyzer — without them the agent hallucinates a feature floor.

branch.question: Is the VCS tree clean AND a PM available for the propose→update checkpoint?

branch.conclusion: Run faion-mlp-agent in strict sequence analyze→find-gaps→propose. PAUSE for human review (r2-human-checkpoint-before-update). On approval, run update→plan. Use B2B weights (r5-b2b-trust-ease-weights) if the product is B2B.
Block. Commit local changes before invoking mode:update — uncommitted state mixes agent edits with manual edits and is unreviewable.
Run analyze + find-gaps for prep, but BLOCK propose→update until a PM is available to review the propose output.

example.p: B2B PM tool MVP, alice ready to review, repo clean. → conclusion r1-mlp-modes-strict-sequence with B2B weights (trust 0.3, ease 0.3, speed 0.2, delight 0.1, personality 0.1).
